overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Max Buffer ETF - September (SEPM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one year period. The exposure is reset annually in September SEPM was launched on Sep 20, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
